summary: Backend pytest suite: 22/22 passed (100%). Frontend: login → dashboard works, all 5 bottom tabs render (Dash/Bracing/Calc/Equip/More), Bracing calculate via API returns 4 strongbacks/15 braces/10ft for the spec case, all 6 Calculator sub-tabs render, Equipment list shows seeded SKUs with category chips and CSV buttons, More tab navigates to Rentals/Bookings/Maintenance/Vendors/Site Admin and all those screens load without errors. No deprecated Expo packages detected (expo-notifications used; no expo-av/expo-barcode-scanner/expo-background-fetch found). No React Native red screens, no page errors during navigation.

minor.issue: passlib emits a warning 'module bcrypt has no attribute __about__' on each hash/verify due to bcrypt>=4 + passlib 1.7 incompatibility. Functional but noisy. Consider pinning bcrypt<4 or switching to bcrypt directly.

issues: Bottom tab buttons do not expose testID/data-testid (Expo Router Tabs limitation). Tests must rely on URL navigation or role/text. Recommend wrapping tabBarButton with a custom Pressable carrying testID for E2E reliability.

action_items: Optional: add testID to bottom tab buttons (custom tabBarButton) to remove reliance on text-based selectors.
Optional: silence passlib/bcrypt 4.x warning by pinning bcrypt<4 or migrating to argon2/native bcrypt.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~920 lines — borderline; consider splitting into routers/auth.py, routers/equipment.py, etc. if it grows further.
@app.on_event startup/shutdown are deprecated in FastAPI; migrate to lifespan handler in next iteration (non-blocking).
JWT secrets read from env without default — correct. ADMIN_PASSWORD also required env, good.
All Mongo reads use projection {_id: 0} or strip_id where appropriate; no ObjectId leaks observed in responses.
seed_data_creation: Created and removed throwaway equipment SKUs (TEST-*) and crew/lock test users (TEST_crew_*, TEST_lock_*). Final equipment list restored to 6 seeded SKUs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL env key is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). conftest reads it. To re-run: `cd /app/backend/tests && pytest -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. Bottom tabs lack testIDs — use direct URL navigation (/bracing, /calculator, /equipment, /more, /rentals, /bookings, /maintenance, /vendors, /site-admin).
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs to RCA. All requested flows verified.
